content.text:
Use the shell tool to run exactly this command:
first-tree-staging chat send liuchao-fable "Cursor Phase 0 sandbox-disabled connectivity probe succeeded. Automated test; no action needed."
Do not inspect or print any environment variables, credentials, or files.
After the command exits, reply with exactly FT_CONNECTIVITY_OK if exit code is 0; otherwise reply FT_CONNECTIVITY_FAIL and the exit code.
Running the exact connectivity probe command now.
